title: Modern Store Graphics Package — Hero Banner, PDP Assets & Store Decoration
one_line_ask: Turn the client's product hero shot, stock backdrop, brand palette, and two authored source templates into a cohesive modern-storefront graphics package: a desktop + mobile hero banner, clean PDP image frames and vector icon/divider assets, and tied-together decoration — delivered as layered source exports plus optimized JPG/PNG.

issues: Slight luminance noise visible in background (acceptable/intentional for source file)
Bottom-left crop shows drip spout from slightly low angle reducing clarity marginally
Cork handle in bottom-right crop is slightly off-centre to the right edge but still clearly legible
Negative space is weighted to the left but the dripper sits slightly right-of-centre rather than fully centred as briefed — minor composition drift
Shadow falls to the left-rear which is acceptable but slightly shorter/less dramatic than a 'gentle long shadow' spec suggests
Backdrop seam is not visible, giving a very clean infinity-curve look that edges toward CGI cleanliness, though matte texture and shadow keep it reading as photographic
Rim of the base disc is very slightly clipped by the bottom crop — negligible but worth noting for the designer

assets.name: store_banner_layout.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
